steps.title: Order group A scores
steps.content:
Group A has $9$ scores. For an odd number of scores, the median is the middle entry, which is the $5$th score after ordering.
$$2,3,4,4,5,6,6,6,9$$
So group A's median is $5$.

steps.title: Order group B scores
steps.content:
Group B has $11$ scores, so the middle position is different: it is the $6$th ordered score.
$$5,5,5,5,6,6,8,8,9,10,10$$
Thus group B's median is $6$.

steps.title: Compare the medians
steps.content: Subtract the group A median from the group B median. $$6-5=1$$ The answer is 1.
